briefdescription.para: This function demonstrates the usage Traffic Generator It does the following:

para.verbatim: - Set up the output terminal if UART16550 is in the hardware build - Initialize the AXI Traffic Generator device - Initialize the Streaming FIFO device - Set the Desired Transfer Count and Transfer Length - Enable the Traffic Generation on the Core - Check for the Streaming data on the FIFO - Return test status and exit

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of the XTrafGen component.
is Device ID of the Axi Traffic Generator Device,
is a pointer to the instance of the XTrafGen component.
contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: -XST_SUCCESS to indicate success -XST_FAILURE to indicate failure
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

detaileddescription.para: This function is the main entry of the traffic generator test.

briefdescription.para: This file demonstrates how to use the xtrafgen driver on the Xilinx AXI Traffic Generator core.

detaileddescription.para: The AXI Traffic Generator IP is designed to generate AXI4 traffic which can be used to stress different modules/ interconnect connected in the system.

This example demonstrates how to use Streaming mode in Axi Traffic Generator When Configured in Master only mode.In this mode the core generates Streaming Traffic based on the transfer length and transfer count configured. To test this example hardware Must contain a Streaming FIFO and the Connections To Axi TrafficGen needs to made As shown below ____________ _________|AXI_STR_RXD | | | | | | | |_____| | | | axi_master| |________________| |____________|

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.01a adk 03/09/13 First release 2.00a adk 16/09/13 Fixed CR:737291 2.01a adk 15/11/13 Fixed CR:760808 4.1 ms 01/23/17 Modified xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028. ms 04/05/17 Added tabspace for return statements in functions for proper documentation while generating doxygen and also modified filename tag to include the file in doxygen examples. 4.9 vlt 12/18/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details. vlt 01/27/26 Fixed codespell issues.
